goal: Seed-graph QA census — full sweep of all 516 pedagogical_prerequisite edges + all 380 nodes, scoring C1 prerequisite soundness (independent drift check vs the production audit's 13% baseline), C2 teaching_notes traction, and C3 summary cold-readability. 19 shard sessions + 1 closeout. Feeds Phase 6 self-correction. Methodology: engine/build_readiness/seed_qa_audit.md. Shards: engine/build_readiness/seed_qa_evidence/shards.json. Disposition is a later interactive session, not this routine target.
